3226170.name: The Sound of Yars Rising - Official Soundtrack
3226170.description:
Chill out and jam out with the official Yars Rising soundtrack from Atari and WayForward! Join hacking prodigy Emi “Yar” Kimura on a cyberpunk action-adventure as she battles the shadowy QoTech corporation.

  • Over 2 hours of music to hack to across 53 tracks
  • A variety of genres from over 22 different artists
  • Includes both MP3 and Apple Lossless (M4A) formats
